PDFSheet.no_src: First Change the Sheet configuration to the Default PDF Page Sheet, configure the PDF url, and then switch it back to the Read Only PDF Sheet configuration.

attrib.max_augment: Your augmentation modifier is higher than 4. A maximum of 4 is applied to your Attribute.

edge_boost.add_edge_pool: Add Edge to your dice pool
edge_boost.count_2_glitch: Count 2s as glitches for the target
edge_boost.heal_1_stun: Heal one box of Stun damage

label.name: Name
label.speed_detail: You are moving with {speed} km/h ({speedPerTurn} Meter per turn). Your modifier for checks is {modifier}.

matrix.reference.title: Reference Section
matrix.reference.tooltip:
This section is mainly for referencing which Matrix abilities are possible at which Access Levels, for use with free roleplay.

Refer to the Matrix Operations button in the PAN section of target characters for Matrix Actions done to devices.
matrix.targetActor.title: Initiate Target
matrix.targetActor.tooltip:
Open your target's Limited View sheet. This shows their Matrix Persona if they are present in the Matrix via AR or VR.

You can (un)target a token by hovering your mouse over it and pressing T on your keyboard.
matrix.target_persona.title: Targetting Persona
matrix.target_persona.tooltip:
This section shows Matrix Actions that can target the Persona directly.

Refer to the Matrix Operations button in the PAN section of target characters for Matrix Actions done to devices.

accessLevel.switch: Click to switch access level to see which Matrix Actions are available.
accessLevel.switch_persona: This is your current Access Level to this persona.
accessLevel.access_level_device:
This is your current Access Level to this device.

You can gain a different access level after you have used Backdoor Entry, Brute Force or Known Exploit Backdoor Entry.
accessLevel.access_level_device_admin:
This is your current Access Level to this device.

You are ADMIN due to this being your device or you being PAN Administrator.

device.enable: Click to use this device to access the Matrix.
device.disable: Click to not use this device to access the Matrix.
device.offline: Device is not online on the Matrix due to being bricked or wrong configuration.

matrix.roll.defended.success: You succesfully defended against the Matrix event.
matrix.roll.defended.failed: You failed to defend against the Matrix event.
matrix.linkedAttr.modifier.a: This Matrix Action is linked to Attack and it is lower than your Sleaze. You have a penalty on your dicepool.
matrix.linkedAttr.modifier.s: This Matrix Action is linked to Sleaze and it is lower than your Attack. You have a penalty on your dicepool.
matrix.no_target: This Matrix Action has an automated test flow if you target a specific Matrix Icon instead of rolling it from your Reference Section.

backdoor_entry.name: Backdoor Entry
backdoor_entry.hint: Use a backdoor created by a successful Probe to gain Admin access to a host, device, or Matrix area. The Probe net hits add to this test; success does not count as illegal Admin access, while failure removes the backdoor but does not trigger an alarm, though your Overwatch Score still increases.
backdoor_entry.onSuccess.span: you're slicing into the backdoor you found.
backdoor_entry.onFailure.span: slicing is too difficult for you
backdoor_entry.onFailure.button: Tell the decker to be better

brute_force.name: Brute Force
brute_force.hint: Attack a device directly to gain fast illicit access, but the target is always alerted and GOD score accumulates with each test. Going straight to Admin access uses Willpower + (Firewall + 2) as defense and gives the target +4 Defense Rating.
brute_force.onClick:
Do you want to gain ADMIN access without first gaining USER access?

Going straight to ADMIN access uses Willpower + (Firewall + 2) as defense and gives the target +4 Defense Rating.
brute_force.to_admin: Initiator has chosen to Brute Force directly to the ADMIN access level.

calibration.name: Calibration
calibration.hint: Increase the Initiative Score of yourself and teammates sharing your AR Feed by 1 per 2 hits. The bonus cannot exceed your Data Processing, only one Calibration can be active, it drops by 1 each Combat Turn, and you can share with a number of users up to your Device Rating.

change_icon.name: Change Icon
change_icon.hint: Replace a target's Icon with one you designed or copied. This can fool casual observers, but it does not change what Matrix Perception reveals.

check_os.name: Check OS
check_os.hint: Learn your current Overwatch Score on a successful test.

control_device.name: Control Device
control_device.hint: Take extended remote control of a device and use it as if you were its owner, within your current access level. Control lasts until you give it up or are forced out, and it fails automatically against a device currently jumped into by a rigger.

crack_file.name: Crack File
crack_file.hint: Remove protection from a file, making it readable.

crash_program.name: Crash Program
crash_program.hint: Crash one running program on the target device. You must know which program to target, usually through Matrix Perception or by seeing it in use; the program cannot restart until the device reboots.

data_spike.name: Data Spike
data_spike.hint: Send harmful code to a persona or device, causing Matrix damage equal to your Attack Attribute divided by 2, rounded up, plus 1 box per net hit.

disarm_data_bomb.name: Disarm Data Bomb
disarm_data_bomb.hint: Disarm a Data Bomb you detected, usually with Matrix Perception. Any net hits remove and delete it; without net hits, the Data Bomb activates.

device_lock.name: Device Lock
device_lock.hint: Prevent a device from going offline for a number of rounds equal to your net hits. After that, you may spend one Minor Action to extend the lock by 1 round, but only once.

denial_of_service.name: Denial of Service
denial_of_service.hint: Pollute a wirelessly active device or persona with noise, applying a dice pool penalty equal to net hits x 2 to all tests made with that device until the end of the next combat round.

delayed_command.name: Delayed Command
delayed_command.hint: Send a command with a time delay that the device accepts as coming from its owner. If successful, it executes after the delay even if wireless is turned off, but a reboot before execution deletes it.

edit_file.name: Edit File
edit_file.hint: Create, change, copy, delete, or protect a file. Each action changes one detail, continuous edits need one action per combat round, copied files become yours, protected files cannot be copied, and a Data Bomb triggers if not disarmed first.

encrypt_file.name: Encrypt File
encrypt_file.hint: Protect a file with an Encryption Rating equal to the hits on this test, opposing future Crack File attempts.

enter_host.name: Enter/Exit Host
enter_host.hint: Enter or leave a host. Entering requires the appropriate access level; leaving requires no special access.

erase_matrix_signature.name: Erase Matrix Sign
erase_matrix_signature.hint: Remove a Matrix signature left by a Resonance being, such as a technomancer or sprite. You must have a Resonance rating, and this illegal Matrix Action can still increase your Overwatch Score.

format_device.name: Format Device
format_device.hint: Rewrite a device's boot code so the next reboot shuts it down until repaired. It loses wireless modifiers and Matrix access, but may still work as a normal mechanism where possible.

full_matrix_defense.name: Full Matrix Defense
full_matrix_defense.hint: Until the end of the combat round, add your Firewall to all Matrix-based defense tests. This is an Anytime action.

garbage_in_out.name: Garbage In/Garbage Out
garbage_in_out.hint: Reroute one input or output of a single device to trigger a different command. It cannot override basic safety features, and the gamemaster decides what is possible.

hash_check.name: Hash Check
hash_check.hint: Search a host or device for encrypted files matching specific content. The threshold is 1 with a hash value or 4 when guessing, and net hits reduce the number of possible matches.

hide.name: Hide
hide.hint: Make a target lose track of you in the Matrix, forcing it to spot you again with Matrix Perception. You cannot hide from an Icon with User or Admin access to anything in your network.

jack_out.name: Jack Out
jack_out.hint: Jack yourself out of the Matrix by rebooting your device. You suffer dumpshock if you were in VR, and if you are link-locked you must beat each locking Icon to escape.
jack_out.link_locked: If you are Link Locked, then the icon(s) that locked you must roll Defense in the opposed test.
jack_out.lock_link: You have Link Locked a persona. The outcome of this roll determines if you succeed.
jack_out.onSuccess.button: Apply ACL reset and dumpshock if persona was in VR

jam_signals.name: Jam Signals
jam_signals.hint: Turn your wireless device into a local jammer. As long as you take no further Matrix actions with it, add your hits to the Noise Rating for Matrix actions within 100 meters.

jump_rigged.name: Jump Into Rigged Device
jump_rigged.hint: Jump into a vehicle or drone with rigger adaptation while in VR and using a control rig. You need the proper access or permission, and you cannot jump in if someone else already is.

known_exploit.name: Known Exploit Backdoor Entry
known_exploit.hint: Use known exploits to gain Admin access without a prior Probe; patched hosts or devices are harder. You cannot gain or spend Edge, the target gains 1 temporary Edge, success does not count as illegal Admin access, and failure does not alarm the target, though your Overwatch Score still increases.
known_exploit.cannot_edge: You cannot gain or spend any Edge on this roll.

masquerade.name: Masquerade
masquerade.hint: Impersonate a persona on the Matrix for 1 minute per net hit. It can fool casual systems and observers, but not device ownership, major financial actions, or anything tied to being the true owner.

matrix_perception.name: Matrix Perception
matrix_perception.hint: Spot hidden Icons or learn information about a target. More net hits reveal more details, such as Device Rating, Matrix Attributes, running programs, and other information the gamemaster provides.

matrix_search.name: Matrix Search
matrix_search.hint: Search the public Matrix for information about a subject. More hits reveal more information, using the Legwork Results table as a guideline.

metahuman_middle.name: Metahuman in the Middle
metahuman_middle.hint: Insert yourself between a device and its Matrix traffic. On success, all calls, communications, and Matrix actions to or from the target route through your device for minutes equal to net hits.

modify_icon.name: Modify Icon
modify_icon.hint: Make a Matrix Icon appear to be a different Icon, such as making a weapon look harmless. Each scan can reveal the disguise with an opposed test.

probe.name: Probe
probe.hint: Search for weaknesses without automatically alerting the target, unless you glitch. A successful Probe creates a backdoor for Backdoor Entry, adds net hits to that later test, and usually lasts for 10 minus Host or Device Rating hours or until you go offline.

pop_up.name: Popup
pop_up.hint: Flood a target device or persona with popup AROs or windows. On success, the target cannot spend Edge for a number of combat rounds equal to your net hits.

reboot_device.name: Reboot Device
reboot_device.hint: Force a device, persona, or PAN offline until the end of the next combat round. This resets its Overwatch Score and access, causes no dumpshock, and cannot be done while link-locked.
reboot_device.forced_to_reboot: Roll Defense if you are being forced to Reboot Device
reboot_device.onSuccess.button: Apply ACL reset to this persona
reboot_device.onFailedDefense.button: Apply ACL reset to this persona

reconfigure.name: Reconfigure Matrix Attribute
reconfigure.hint: Swap the base ratings of two non-zero Matrix Attributes on your Matrix Persona, even if they come from different devices.

relinquish_access.name: Relinquish Access
relinquish_access.hint: You relinquish your access to a specific host, PAN or device. If you had illegal access, you no longer generate OS for that target.
relinquish_access.onSuccess.button: Decrease access to this icon to OUTSIDER
relinquish_access.onFailure.button: Decrease access to this icon to OUTSIDER

send_message.name: Send Message
send_message.hint: Send a short text or audio message, image, file, or live feed through the Matrix. With DNI, you can send longer, more complex messages even in AR.

set_data_bomb.name: Set Data Bomb
set_data_bomb.hint: Attach one Data Bomb to a file with a rating up to your net hits, choose whether it deletes the file, and set a passcode. If triggered, it deals Rating x 2 Matrix damage, may delete the file, and then deletes itself.

snoop.name: Snoop
snoop.hint: Intercept Matrix traffic sent to and from your target for as long as you have access. You can monitor it live or save it for later if you have storage.

spoof_command.name: Spoof Command
spoof_command.hint: Send a command to a device that it accepts as coming from its owner. The device attempts to perform it as its next available Major Action.

squelch.name: Squelch
squelch.hint: Prevent the target device from calling or sending messages for minutes equal to your net hits.

subvert_infrastructure.name: Subvert Infrastructure
subvert_infrastructure.hint: Slightly alter groups of similar simple devices slaved to a host, such as traffic lights or cameras. You need at least Admin access, affect one group per net hit, cannot attack with it, and sustain control with a Major Action each combat round.

switch_ifmode.name: Switch Interface Mode
switch_ifmode.hint: Switch your interface between AR and VR.

tarpit.name: Tarpit
tarpit.hint: Deal 1 + net hits Matrix damage and reduce the target's Data Processing by the same amount. Data Processing recovers by 1 each combat round, and at 0 the target cannot take Matrix actions.

threat_analysis.name: Threat Analysis
threat_analysis.hint: Highlight threats for allies sharing your AR Feed, granting bonus dice to Defense tests equal to your hits until your next turn. This works in the physical world and the Matrix, and you can share with a number of users up to your Data Processing.

trace_icon.name: Trace Icon
trace_icon.hint: Find the physical location of a device or persona while you can still detect it. This does not work on IC or hosts without a physical location.

virtual_aim.name: Virtual Aim
virtual_aim.hint: Gain +1 dice pool bonus for a Matrix attack such as Data Spike, Tarpit, or Resonance Spike. You can use this once per combat round, the bonus stacks up to your Willpower, and it is lost if you attack or skip Virtual Aim in a round.

watchdog.name: Watchdog
watchdog.hint: Watch a persona or device for combat rounds equal to your net hits. You see its Matrix Actions before it uses them, may try to intervene, and can use Threat Analysis as a Minor Action against attacks from that target.

newitem.complexform: How complex do you like it?
newitem.sin: Who are you? Who, who, who, who

baby_monitor.name: Baby Monitor
baby_monitor.desc: Tells you your current Overwatch Score without needing an action.

browse.name: Browse
browse.desc: When doing Matrix searches, gain 1 Edge that is either spent immediately on that action or disappears.

configurator.name: Configurator
configurator.desc: Store alternate deck configuration, swap to it instead of changing two attributes.

edit.name: Edit
edit.desc: When doing Edit File action, gain 1 Edge that must be immediately spent or else it vanishes.

encryption.name: Encryption
encryption.desc: +2 dice when doing Encrypt File action

virtual_machine.name: Virtual Machine
virtual_machine.desc: 2 extra program slots; take 1 extra box of unresisted Matrix damage when attacked

biofeedback.name: Biofeedback
biofeedback.desc: Causes Stun (if target is in cold-sim) or Physical (if target is in hot-sim) damage with Matrix attack. This program is linked to the Attack attribute.

biofeedback_filter.name: Biofeedback Filter
biofeedback_filter.desc: Allow Device Rating or Body roll to soak Matrix damage.

blackout.name: Blackout
blackout.desc: Like Biofeedback, but Stun damage only. This program is linked to the Attack attribute.

defuse.name: Defuse
defuse.desc: Allow Device Rating or Body roll to soak damage from Data Bomb.

exploit.name: Exploit
exploit.desc: Reduce Defense Rating of hacking target by 2.

fork.name: Fork
fork.desc: Hit two targets with a single Matrix action without splitting dice pools.

lockdown.name: Lockdown
lockdown.desc: Cause link-lock when you do Matrix damage.

overclock.name: Overclock
overclock.desc: Add two dice to a Matrix action. One of them must be the wild die.

stealth.name: Stealth
stealth.desc: When performing a Hide action, gain 1 Edge that must be spent as part of the action or vanish. This program is linked to the Sleaze attribute.

trace.name: Trace
trace.desc: When performing a Trace Icon action, gain 1 Edge that must be spent as part of the action or vanish. This program is linked to the Sleaze attribute.

roll.create: Create your own Shadowrun Dice Pool
roll.click_chat: Click to show the dice rolled and to spend Edge
roll.cantDodgeBullets: Increase threshold by circumstances after setting distance

edge.gain_player_capped: {name} would gain {value} Edge, but cannot gain more than {capped}.
edge.noEdgeGain: You cannot gain any Edge on this roll.
edge.noEdgeSpend: You cannot spend any Edge on this roll.
edge.noEdgeUse: You cannot gain or spend any Edge on this roll.
edge.situationalEdgeA: You have gained one Edge that you must spend on this roll. (In this Dialog, or in the Chat by re-rolling a die.)
edge.tempEdge: You have gained one temporary Edge that you must spend on this roll.

roll.failedDefense: You got hit and now it is going to hurt
roll.bio_feedback.description: You’re also disoriented and so cannot gain or use Edge on actions for (10 – Willpower) minutes, even if you manage to soak all the damage.
roll.subject: Chatmessage
roll.successfulSoak: You managed to ignore the damage
roll.wilddie: Replace a die with a wild die

persona.title: Persona
persona.image.tooltip: Left click to show image, or Right click to edit the image

pan.title: Personal Area Network
pan.name: PAN Name
pan.share: Share your PAN via chat message to your chummers.
pan.share_message1: {name} would like to share their Personal Area Network (PAN) with you.
pan.share_message3: Drag this effect onto your character sheet or token.
pan.share_tooltip: Dragging this onto your character sheet or token creates an Effect to join a PAN.

maxEdgePerRound.hint: Defines the maximum egde a player or NPC can gain per turn.
maxEdgePerRound.name: Maximum Edge earned per turn

importToCompendium.hint: Define if imported NPCs should be added as actors or as entries to the NPCs compendium
importToCompendium.name: Import to compendium

tokensLimitedOwnership.hint: If enabled, if you drop any Actor with 'Link Actor Data' disabled in its prototype onto the Canvas, the Token will have a Limited Ownership (so players can click on it to see the Read Only sheets with Matrix Persona/PAN information) if the Actor was configurd with No Ownership. This allows you to hide Actors in the Actor tab from view, while still allowing players to see their Read Only sheets.
tokensLimitedOwnership.name: Tokens Read Only & Matrix Sheets

defaultThreshold.hint: Defines the default threshold used for any skill check
defaultThreshold.name: Default Threshold

hardDiceCap.hint: In standard play, there is a maximum of 20 dice for any test. No combination of abilities, skills, effects, or augments can exceed this limit during a roll. Exception: Pre-edging a test allows you to exceed the 20-dice cap with the bonus dice granted by Edge.
hardDiceCap.name: Hard Dice Cap

matrixSoakByPanLeader.hint: By default, Matrix damage is resisted by the target's Firewall. (CRB p.179) If this option is enabled, the PAN leader's Firewall will be used to soak Matrix damage for all PAN members instead.
matrixSoakByPanLeader.name: Matrix Damage Soak by PAN Leader

hackSlashMatrix.hint: Enable to show Matrix Actions from the Hack & Slash rulebook on character sheets. (HS p.28)
hackSlashMatrix.name: Hack & Slash Matrix Actions

dosPopupMatrix.hint: Change Denial of Service and Popup to be OUTSIDER/USER/ADMIN instead of OUTSIDER only, just like Data Spike and Tarpit. This is likely an oversight in H&S. (Recommended to be enabled within FoundryVTT due to the PAN<>Persona implementation.)
dosPopupMatrix.name: Denial of Service & Popup

bleeding.hint: Use this rule to represent ongoing damage stemming from serious injuries. (SWC p.145)
bleeding.name: Bleeding

armorLessensDmg.hint: Use this rule to reduce the amount of physical damage suffered. After resisting damage (from other sources than toxins or statuses), convert one box of Physical damage to Stun for every 8 full points of DR you have. (SWC p.149)
armorLessensDmg.name: Armor Lessens Physical Damage

rollStrengthCombat.hint: Close Combat attacks may roll Strength instead of Agility for any unarmed attacks or if the weapon relies on both mass and momentum. When using this, add Agility to Attack Rating in place of Strength. When relevant to the weapon, it must be wielded in both hands. (SWC p.150)
rollStrengthCombat.name: Rolling Strength Instead Of Agility In Close Combat

highStrengthAddsDamage.hint: If your Strength is at least 7, increase your melee DV by 1. If your Strength is 10 or higher, increase your melee DV by 2. Weapons that do not benefit from high strength do not increase DV. (SWC p.150)
highStrengthAddsDamage.name: High Strength Adds To Damage

highStrengthReducesRecoil.hint: The AR penalties for firing mode attacks are lessened by 1 if the attacker’s strength is 7 or higher, and by 2 at 10 strength or higher. Both hands must be used to control the firearm. (SWC p.150)
highStrengthReducesRecoil.name: High Strength Reduces Recoil

cantDodgeBullets.hint: Any Opposed test for an attack is instead a Simple test against a threshold that is set by distance and the size of the target defensepool. The target of the attack may still use Edge Boosts against the attacker's dice. (SWC p.151)
cantDodgeBullets.name: You Can't Dodge Bullets

expandedSpecializations.hint: Use no limit on the number  of specializations a skill may have. You are not required to purchase an expertise before taking additional specializations. Expertises are still limited to one per skill (SWC p.153)
expandedSpecializations.name: Expanded Specializations

pdf.hint: Configure the PDF journal for this Shadowrun Sixth World book.
pdf.offset.name: Offset
pdf.offset.hint: Configure the page offset. Example if page 12 is actually page 11, offset is 1.

dataEntry.hint: Enable to change the GENESIS/Commlink ID and the Shadowrun book & page number an Item is from in the Item Sheet.
dataEntry.name: Item Data Entry

notifications.You_are_not_owner_of_the_target: You cannot use this, as you are not the owner of the target.
notifications.You_are_not_owner_of_the_token: You are not owner of the token.
notifications.Select_a_single_token: You have multiple tokens selected. Only select a single token to perform this action.
notifications.You_can_only_choose_Wide_Burst_when_you_: You can only choose Wide Burst when you target (T) two tokens.
notifications.Target_or_select_a_token_before_rolling: Target or select a token before rolling. You can (un)target a token by hovering your mouse over it and pressing T on your keyboard
notifications.Select_a_token_first: Select a token first, or configure your Player Character actor in your User Configuration.
notifications.Target_a_token_before_rolling: Target (T) a token before rolling. You can (un)target a token by hovering your mouse over it and pressing T on your keyboard
notifications.Target_a_token_first: Target (T) a token first before using this. You can (un)target a token by hovering your mouse over it and pressing T on your keyboard
notifications.defaulting_spell_to_self: No token targeted, defaulting to casting on yourself.
notifications.two_targets_but_wrong_fire_mode: You have two targets, so you can only fire using Burst Fire: Wide Burst, or using Full Auto mode.
notifications.many_targets_but_not_autofire_fire_mode: You have more than two targets, so you can only fire using Full Auto mode.
notifications.attack_with_no_AR: You're trying to attack while your Attack Rating is 0, e.g. due to distance.
notifications.Target_is_not_a_life_form: Target is not a life form.
notifications.do_not_revert_damage: Overflow into Physical monitor. Do not revert back this damage via chat button, as it won't calculate correctly.
notifications.No_actor_or_tokens_selected: Assign yourself a Player Character, or select tokens before rolling.
notifications.You_are_not_owner_of_the_tokens: You are not owner of the selected tokens.
notifications.no_weapon_skill_set: Please edit the weapon to assign a linked skill, before rolling.
notifications.only_owner_is_allowed_to_spend_edge: Only the characters owner is allowed to spend edge on this edge boost.
notifications.owner_not_logged_in: Edge Boost is not possible, e.g. due to person who rolled the test not being online.
notifications.edge_boost_is_not_post_edge: '{boostTitle}' is no post roll edge boost
notifications.you_require_more_edge: Not enough Edge available. You require {edge} more to perform this boost.
notifications.no_die_with_a_1_or_4: Your roll does not have a 1 or 4, so this Edge Boost is not useful.
notifications.cant_increase_die: You can't increase this die with this Edge Boost, as it would be without use.
notifications.character_has_spent_edge: {actor} has spent {edge} edge on the Edge Boost {edgeBoost}.
notifications.reroll_failed_requires_index: Select one or more dice before clicking on the `Spend` button.
notifications.edge_boost_cannot_be_used_glitch: This Edge Boost cannot be used if a glitch or critical glitch is rolled.
notifications.reopen_dice_tooltip: You switched selected tokens. Re-open the dice section in the chat to perform an Edge Boost.
notifications.extended_test_validation: When performing an Extended Test, Threshold and Interval must be 0 or larger.

migration.start: System migration is in progress. Do not close or refresh the window!

notifications.wrong_import_file: Cannot import a GENESIS or COMMLINK save file! Use the FoundryVTT JSON Export instead.

statblock_import.error: Something went wrong importing the NPC Statblock. Use a different PDF reader or your statblock might not be supported.
statblock_import.success: Your `{actor}` statblock was imported into the

notifications.not_enough_ammo: You don't have enough ammunition in your weapon. Change your firing mode, or reload your weapon first.
notifications.character_has_reloaded: {character} has reloaded their {weaponName} weapon with {ammoType} ammo.
notifications.character_has_switched_ammo: {character} has switched the ammo loaded in their {weaponName} weapon to {ammoType}.
notifications.character_has_changed_edge: {character} has changed their Edge manually from {oldEdge} to {edge}
notifications.bind_control_group: You have bound the selected tokens to Control Group {controlGroup}.
notifications.select_control_group: You have selected the Control Group {controlGroup} tokens.
notifications.form_grunt_group: You have formed a Grunt Group with the selected Tokens.
notifications.dismantle_grunt_group: You have dismantled the Grunt Group of the selected Tokens.
notifications.form_grunt_group_failed: The selected tokens were not valid for a Grunt Group. They must not have "Link Actor Data" enabled in their Token Configuration.
notifications.grunt_group_takes_two: You need more than one Token selected to form a Grunt Group.
notifications.edge_has_been_reset: All Edge has been reset by the GM.
notifications.accessLevels_have_been_reset: All Access Levels have been reset by G.O.D.
notifications.one_accessLevel_has_been_reset: Access Levels of one character have been reset by G.O.D.
notifications.effect_migration_to_v2: Migrated the Active Effect Key(s) to be usable by ActorV2
notifications.deviceRatingMigration:
Migrated all Gear to the default Device Rating of 2, and Cyberware to Standard Grade.

Inform all players they need to adjust their Gear and Cyberware if necessary.
notifications.tokensLimitedOwnership: Dropped unlinked tokens get a minimum of Limited Ownership. If you want to change this, you will need to delete the token and drop it again onto the canvas.
notifications.notificationOnce: This message will only show once during this browser session.

dice.wild_ignored: Hit cancelled due to a 1 rolled while rolling with a Wild Die.
dice.extended_success: In total {timePassed} {intervalScale} passed, and you succeeded with your task.
dice.extended_failure: In total {timePassed} {intervalScale} passed, but you failed at your task.

extended.desc: In total {timePassed} {intervalScale} passed, and you have {hits} hits in total.

legwork.legwork_description: How much does {name} know or can find out via their network?
legwork.loyalty_description: How willing is {name} to share what they know or can find out with you?
legwork.payformore: «You know, I've got expenses that I need to cover. For some extra nuyen I can help you with more information..»

results.2: A few nuggets of information gleaned from casual study.
results.3: Information from previous coursework or loose professional knowledge.
results.4: More esoteric knowledge, some whispers of gossip.
results.5: Deep academic familiarity, strong professional knowledge, behind-the-scenes familiarity.
results.6: Knowledge of secrets and hidden information.
results.7: High-level information, solid understanding of history.
results.8: Almost encyclopedic knowledge, including some deep secrets.
results.9: Rare knowledge only available to a select few.
results.10: Deep secrets others actively try to hide.

effect.Label: Effects
effect.CantDelete: You can only delete this effect from it's Item.

active_effect.explanation: Active Effects can modify attribute modifiers and pools of your character or item. Please open a Feature Request ticket if you miss an automation needed for a Shadowrun item or quality.

usage_tips.1: In general, use a Modifier key to adjust an Attribute, Pool or Rating.
usage_tips.2: Only use a Pool key if you need to Override a complete attribute, like with Cyberlimbs or Skillwires.
usage_tips.3: As normal in Shadowrun 6E, Attribute and Skill Modifiers are automatically capped at +4.

active_effect.item_tip: If you want to adjust an Item statistic itself, you must disable the Apply Effect to Actor checkbox in the Details tab. An Active Effect can only apply to either an Actor or an Item. Do NOT use Attribute Keys meant for Gear Mods on Actors, and visa versa.
active_effect.gear_mod_tip: This is an Active Effect of a Gear Mod. Any Effects are applied to the Item this is installed in. Do NOT use Attribute Keys meant for Actors on Gear Mods, and visa versa.
active_effect.more_info: For more information, see the following link:
active_effect.advanced_hint: If checked, you can enter custom System Attribute Keys instead of only the Shadowrun 6E system advised list.

KEYBINDINGS.bindTokenControlGroup: Bind selected Tokens to Control Group
KEYBINDINGS.formGruntGroup: Create Grunt Group with selected Tokens

shadowrun6.resetEdgeDescription: Do you want to reset Edge for all Actors and selected Tokens?
shadowrun6.resetAccessLevelsDescription: Do you want to reset Access Levels for all Actors and Tokens in the game?
shadowrun6.resetOneAccessLevelDescription: Do you want to reset Access Levels for this one Actor?

isElectronicMatrixDevice.label: Matrix Device
isElectronicMatrixDevice.hint: If enabled, this gear is considered an Electronic Matrix Device, has a Device Rating, and can be used through a DNI, AR or VR.

hasWirelessInterface.label: Wireless Interface
hasWirelessInterface.hint: If enabled, this gear is an Electronic Matrix Device with a Wireless Interface. When Wireless is active, it can be used through AR or VR. It usually has a Wireless bonus.

hasDataCableInterface.label: Data Cable Interface
hasDataCableInterface.hint: If enabled, this gear has a Data Cable Interface and can be used through a DNI via a Direct Connection. Cyberware always have a Data Cable Interface.

deviceRating.label: Device Rating
tooltip: The rating of the Electronic Matrix Device. Device Rating determines the devices Matrix Condition Monitor.
Most relevant devices are given a Device Rating in their rulebook, but if not provided use the following as a guideline:
1: Simple devices, like General appliances, public terminals, entertainment systems.
2: Average devices, like Personal electronics, basic cyberware, weapons, residential security devices, basic vehicles.
3: Smart devices, like Security vehicles, alphaware, corporate security devices.
4: Advanced devices, like High-end devices, betaware, military vehicles and security devices.
5: Cutting-edge devices, like credsticks, black-ops vehicles and security devices.
6+: Bleeding Edge devices, like Deltaware, Gammaware, Billion-nuyen experimental devices, space craft.

wirelessActive.label: Wireless
wirelessActive.hint: If on, this gear is currently being used through a wireless interface. Some items, like a credstick can only be used if their Wireless interface are active. The gear's Wireless Bonus can be used if this is active.

cyberwareGrade.label: Cyberware Grade
cyberwareGrade.hint:
The grade of your cyberware does not just determine its essence and nuyen costs, but also it's Device Rating.

Device Rating determines its Matrix Condition Monitor.

ammoLoaded.label: Ammo Loaded
ammoLoaded.hint: Select which type of ammo is currently loaded in your ranged weapon.

title.changeEdge: Increase (left click) or decrease (right click) Edge
title.onlyGmCanRevive: Only your GM can revive a dead character.
title.clickItemName: Show description (left click) or send it to chat (right click)
title.noRollNeeded: No roll needed. Click to send description to Chat.
title.matrixCmPenalty: Your Electronic Matrix Device is damaged via the Matrix.
title.createsPersona: Your Persona is created by the main device you use to access the Matrix.
title.pan: A Personal Area Network (PAN) is a network of any number of Matrix devices all owned by the same person and together are all worn, implanted, carried, or otherwise on your person.
title.living_network:
Your living persona can create and participate in a PAN.

A Personal Area Network (PAN) is a network of any number of Matrix devices all owned by the same person and together are all worn, implanted, carried, or otherwise on your person.

In SR6e FoundryVTT, all Technomancers are assumed to already have taken the Living Network echo.
title.pan_admin: The PAN Leader, it's Administrator, serves as the controlelr of the entire network. This persona’s Matrix stats and mental stats will form the defense pool for Matrix Actions against the entire team network
title.deviceLimit:
A PAN can incorporate a limited number of remotely operated devices; this mechanic is called the device limit.

Devices such as vehicles, drones, data taps, smart firing platforms, and sensor tags are common examples of devices that will consume a PAN’s limited device limit, if they are used at a meaningful distance away from the user.

This device limit remains reserved for your own sub-PAN.
title.notGM: Only the GM can use this.
